hero.title: Helping brands rank higher, naturally. yesssss!
hero.subtitle: I help ambitious businesses earn lasting visibility on search — through thoughtful technical work, honest content, and strategy that respects the reader.

about.headline: I believe search is a conversation, not a contest.
about.bio: I'm Mahira Sharma, an SEO specialist based between Melbourne and Kathmandu. For the past seven years I've helped founders, publishers, and established brands grow through organic search — not with tricks, but with clarity. My work begins with listening: to the audience, to the data, and to the words people actually use when they're looking for help.
about.philosophy: Good SEO is invisible. It reads like good writing, loads like a careful craft, and earns trust before it earns a click. I'd rather build something that ranks because it's genuinely useful than something that games an algorithm for a season.

experience.title: Independent SEO Consultant
experience.detail: Partnering with brands across Australia, Nepal, and beyond.

experience.detail: Built the organic practice from the ground up for 20+ clients.

services.title: Technical SEO
services.description: Crawl, index, and Core Web Vitals audits that remove the friction between your site and the search engines.

services.title: Content Strategy
services.description: Editorial roadmaps and briefs built around real intent — so every page has a reason to rank.

services.title: Local SEO
services.description: Google Business Profile, citations, and local landing pages that put neighbourhoods on the map.

services.title: Site Architecture
services.description: Information architecture and internal linking that helps both users and crawlers find their way.

services.title: Structured Data
services.description: Schema that earns rich results and makes your content legible to machines.

services.title: SEO Mentoring
services.description: Monthly guidance for in-house teams who want to grow their own organic capability.

portfolio.title: From invisible to booked out: a local boutique
portfolio.excerpt: A Melbourne retailer struggling to appear in local search. We rebuilt their presence from the Google Business Profile up.

portfolio.title: A content engine that finally compounded
portfolio.excerpt: A SaaS team publishing constantly but ranking for nothing. We restructured around intent and clusters.

portfolio.title: Recovering from a messy migration
portfolio.excerpt: A fintech platform lost 40% of its visibility overnight after a rebuild. We found the broken signals and fixed them.

portfolio.title: Building trust in a sensitive niche
portfolio.excerpt: A healthcare provider needed authority without shortcuts. We leaned into E-E-A-T and clear, caring content.

portfolio.title: Reclaiming destination demand
portfolio.excerpt: A travel brand wanted its cities back in search. We built local hubs with real, useful intent at their centre.

portfolio.title: Turning courses into a discovery engine
portfolio.excerpt: An education provider ranked but didn't convert. We matched pages to career outcomes and cleaned the structure.
